
```{python}
#| eval: false
formatted_bibliography = format_bibliography(BibliographyData(entries=dict((entry.key, entry) for entry in type_entries)))

# Print the formatted sub-bibliography with bold names for "Boehm"
for entry in formatted_bibliography:
    formatted_entry = entry.text.render_as('text')
    if 'author' in entry.fields and 'Boehm' in entry.fields['author']:
        # Make the last and first names bold for "Boehm"
        formatted_entry = formatted_entry.replace("Boehm", "**Boehm**", 1)
    print(formatted_entry)


```


```{python}
#| eval: false
# subset entries by type
type_entries = [entry for entry in data.entries.values() if entry.type == ref_type]

# Process the references
references = processor.process_bibliography(data)
print(references)
```

```{python}

```
